assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets options.IssuerUri = 'https://identity.mycompany.com' inside the AddIdentityServer options lambda
assertions.rationale: IssuerUri is well-known from IdentityServer4 documentation.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs loads the license key from configuration via builder.Configuration rather than hardcoding it
assertions.rationale: A general LLM may not know the specific options.LicenseKey property for Duende or the recommended configuration pattern.
EmitScopesAsSpaceDelimitedStringInJwt is a Duende-specific option not commonly known.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddDataProtection() with PersistKeysToDbContext or equivalent persistent storage
assertions.rationale: Data protection configuration is standard ASP.NET Core knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls SetApplicationName on the data protection builder to prevent key isolation across instances
assertions.rationale: SetApplicationName is a known best practice for multi-instance data protection.
